scripts.start: npm run patch-env:local && npx rimraf .angular && ng serve --port=8130 --configuration development
scripts.start:ptp: npm run patch-env:docker && npx rimraf .angular && ng serve --host 0.0.0.0 --allowed-hosts all --port=8130 --configuration development
scripts.pwa: npx rimraf .angular && npm run build && http-server www -p 8080
scripts.update-dependencies: npm run update-ptp && npm run update-decaf
scripts.update-decaf: PREFIX="decaf-ts"; npm ls | grep "$PREFIX" | awk -F/ '{print $NF}' | sed 's/@.*//' | xargs -I package npm update @"$PREFIX"/package
scripts.update-ptp: PREFIX="pharmaledgerassoc"; npm ls | grep "$PREFIX" | awk -F/ '{print $NF}' | sed 's/@.*//' | NPM_TOKEN=$(cat .npmtoken) xargs -I package  npm update @"$PREFIX"/package
scripts.set-git-auth: git config url."https://api:$(cat .token)@github.com/".insteadOf "https://github.com/" && git config url."https://ssh:$(cat .token)@github.com/".insteadOf "ssh://git@github.com/" && git config url."https://git:$(cat .token)@github.com/".insteadOf "git@github.com:"
scripts.reset: rm -rf * && git checkout . && git pull && npm run do-install
scripts.prepare-pr: npm run lint-fix && npm run build:prod && npm run coverage && npm run docs
scripts.drawings: for FILE in workdocs/drawings/*.drawio; do echo "converting $FILE to image..." && docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/data rlespinasse/drawio-export --format png $FILE; done && cp -rf workdocs/drawings/export/* workdocs/resources/
scripts.uml: cd workdocs/uml && for FILE in ./*.puml; do docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/work -w /work miy4/plantuml -DPLANTUML_LIMIT_SIZE=8192 -tpng $FILE; done && cd ../.. && cp -fr workdocs/uml/*.png workdocs/resources/
scripts.docs: npx rimraf ./docs && mkdir docs && npx build-scripts --docs
scripts.docker:build: DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build --secret id=TOKEN,src=$PWD/.npmtoken -t ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew:$(cat package.json | jq -r '.version') -t ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew:${VERSION:-latest} -f ./Dockerfile .
scripts.docker:build-base: DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build --secret id=TOKEN,src=$PWD/.npmtoken -t ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew:base-$(cat package.json | jq -r '.version') -t ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew:base-${VERSION:-latest} --target base -f ./Dockerfile .
scripts.docker:publish: docker push ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew:$(cat package.json | jq -r '.version') && docker push ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew:${VERSION:-latest}
scripts.docker:publish-base: docker push ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew:base-$(cat package.json | jq -r '.version') && docker push ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew:base-${VERSION:-latest}
scripts.docker:publish-local: npm run docker:login && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build --secret id=TOKEN,src=$PWD/.npmtoken -t ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew-local:$(cat package.json | jq -r '.version') -t ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew-local:${VERSION:-latest} -f ./Dockerfile . && docker push ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew-local:$(cat package.json | jq -r '.version') && docker push ghcr.io/pharmaledgerassoc/ptp-frontend-ew-local:${VERSION:-latest}
scripts.docker:remove-local: docker rm -f $(docker ps -a -q --filter "ancestor=ptp-frontend-ew-local") 2>/dev/null || true && docker rm -f $(docker ps -a -q --filter "name=ptp-frontend-ew-local") 2>/dev/null || true && ids=$(docker images | grep 'ptp-frontend-ew-local' | awk '{print $3}') [ -n "$ids" ] && docker rmi -f
